title: fix: wrap pollen pack buttons on mobile
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pocket-sized pollen packs
gist.blurb: Fixed a layout bug that was causing pollen pack buttons to overflow on mobile screens. Everything stacks neatly now, just as nature intended.
gist.summary: Updated the pollen purchase grid to use responsive columns, fixing an overflow issue on mobile screens.
gist.impact: Mobile users can now comfortably view and select pollen packs without horizontal scrolling or broken layouts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing tiny glowing boxes (representing pollen packs) into neat, responsive columns on a giant smartphone screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing tiny glowing boxes into neat columns on a large smartphone screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing tiny glowing boxes into neat columns on a large smartphone screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
